# Magnolia Coasts Photography

> Professional portrait and family photographer serving Mississauga, Etobicoke, Oakville, and the Greater Toronto Area (GTA). Owned and operated by Stephanie, with 11+ years of professional experience and 14+ years specializing in newborn photography. Studio located in Mississauga, Ontario.

## Services

- [Newborn Photography](https://magnoliacoastsphotography.com/investment/newborn): Studio and in-home newborn sessions for babies 4-30 days old. Packages from $450-$650 including props, custom sets, outfits, and family poses. Serving Mississauga, Etobicoke, Oakville, and the GTA.
- [Maternity Photography](https://magnoliacoastsphotography.com/investment/maternity): Indoor and outdoor maternity sessions capturing pregnancy. Packages from $300-$400 including outfits, crowns, and accessories. Available in Mississauga, Etobicoke, Oakville, and throughout the GTA.
- [Family Photography](https://magnoliacoastsphotography.com/investment/family): Family portrait sessions including multi-generational photography. Packages from $220-$550. Outdoor and studio options in Mississauga, Etobicoke, Oakville, and the GTA.
- [Milestone Photography](https://magnoliacoastsphotography.com/investment/milestone): Baby milestone sessions (tummy time, sitter, cake smash) documenting a child's first year. Packages from $400-$500. Studio, outdoor, and in-home options in Mississauga, Etobicoke, Oakville, and the GTA.
- [Headshot Photography](https://magnoliacoastsphotography.com/investment/headshot): Professional headshots and personal branding photography for business professionals, actors, and entrepreneurs. Packages from $150-$800. Studio sessions in Mississauga.
- [Collection Packages](https://magnoliacoastsphotography.com/investment): Multi-session bundles combining maternity, newborn, milestone, and cake smash sessions. Packages from $1,050-$2,450 offering significant savings.

## Service Area

Magnolia Coasts Photography is based in Mississauga, Ontario and serves clients across:
- Mississauga
- Etobicoke
- Oakville
- GTA in general

In-home sessions available throughout the GTA with travel included in most packages.

## About the Photographer

Stephanie is the owner and lead photographer at Magnolia Coasts Photography. With over 11 years in the photography business and 14+ years working with newborns, she has photographed thousands of families across the GTA. Many clients return year after year as their families grow. Her approach emphasizes building genuine relationships with clients and creating a comfortable, relaxed session experience. Her style is natural, timeless, and connection-focused.

## Galleries

- [Newborn Gallery](https://magnoliacoastsphotography.com/gallery/newborn): Portfolio of newborn photography sessions
- [Maternity Gallery](https://magnoliacoastsphotography.com/gallery/maternity): Portfolio of maternity photography sessions
- [Family Gallery](https://magnoliacoastsphotography.com/gallery/family): Portfolio of family photography sessions
- [Milestone Gallery](https://magnoliacoastsphotography.com/gallery/milestones): Portfolio of baby milestone sessions
- [Cake Smash Gallery](https://magnoliacoastsphotography.com/gallery/cakesmash): Portfolio of first birthday cake smash sessions
- [Children Gallery](https://magnoliacoastsphotography.com/gallery/children): Portfolio of children's photography sessions
- [Branding Gallery](https://magnoliacoastsphotography.com/gallery/branding): Portfolio of personal branding photography
- [Headshot Gallery](https://magnoliacoastsphotography.com/gallery/headshots): Portfolio of professional headshot sessions

## Why Choose Magnolia Coasts Photography

- 14+ years of newborn photography experience with a focus on baby safety and comfort
- Thousands of families photographed, many returning as long-term clients
- Flexible session locations: Mississauga studio, client homes, outdoor locations, and partner studios across the GTA
- All packages include professional editing, online proofing gallery, and print release
- Custom sets, props, outfits, and accessories provided for newborn and milestone sessions
- Wardrobe consultation included for family sessions
- Relaxed, baby-led approach ensuring comfort for both children and parents
